title: Killing of Lyhanna: What we know about the previous accusations against the suspect
subhed: While awaiting the findings of the inquiries by the national gendarmerie's internal affairs body and the Justice Ministry's oversight authority, Le Monde has compiled the established facts and the outstanding questions surrounding the background of the suspect in the 11-year-old girl's murder.

subhed: Investigating judges on Wednesday charged him with rape, attempted rape, sexual assault and sexual harassment in four cases.

title: 'The Labour Party could sink into lasting decline without an electoral strategy'
subhed: Political scientist Nicolas Jara-Joly discusses the causes of the Labour Party's disastrous results in the United Kingdom's May 7 local elections and the growing electoral competition from the Green Party, in an interview with Le Monde.

title: Jeanne Damas celebrates 10th anniversary of Rouje, a certain ideal of 'the Parisienne'
subhed: The 34-year-old has showcased her youth and creative world since the earliest days of social media. To mark the 10th birthday of her ready-to-wear clothing and beauty brand, she is launching a special collection and opening a coffee shop.

title: The perfume industry's troubled waters, from Hormuz to climate change
subhed: The fragrance industry is feeling the full force of global upheavals, which are causing supply chain problems and putting pressure on prices. In response to rising risks, the sector is reorganizing and developing new tools to better anticipate crises.

Josh O'Connor, star of Spielberg's 'Disclosure Day,' wants to 'cultivate his garden'
subhed: At 36, he is one of the most sought-after actors in both independent cinema and major Hollywood productions. In just a few years, the British artist, who is passionate about gardening, has put his delicate masculinity and subtle acting style to work for a wide range of characters, from a lovesick farmer to Prince Charles or a priest.

title: 'Lyhanna was a victim twice': Women-led rallies across France condemn failures after schoolgirl's death
subhed: Several thousand people gathered on Monday in front of courthouses and city halls to express their dismay at the judicial treatment of sexual violence committed against children. Many demonstrators called for the resignation of Justice Minister Gérald Darmanin.

title: David Hockney, giant of British painting, dies at the age of 88
subhed: Internationally renowned, notably for his painting 'A Bigger Splash' (1967) and his series of pool paintings, the British artist, who lived in Normandy from 2019 to 2023, produced work that straddled pop art and hyperrealism, never hesitating to use new technologies as sources of inspiration. He died on June 11.
